data.text: A FELISIAN WORLD- HAS A FEW LARGE BODIES OF WATER AND A GREEN TINGE.
AT 357.60, IT WAS SLIGHTLY HILLY, COLD AND BARREN, WITH A SMALL LAKE,
BIRDS WERE SIGHTED. AT 206.25 IT WAS AGAIN ICY AND BARREN, SLIGHTLY
HILLY GROUND. AT 79.78, IT WAS COLD AND BARREN ROLLING GROUND WITH A
LARGER LAKE IN THE DISTANCE AND A HOPPER WAS SIGHTED. SKINNYMON EPOC
FURTHER NOTES:AT 289,61 THERE IS DENSE YELLOW SCRUBLAND AMIDST LAND
DOMINATED BY A HILL AND WHAT COULD BE AN OLD BOWL-SHAPED CRATER. ALL
THIS BENEATH A PLEASANT BLUISH SKY AMIDST TEMPERATURES OF AROUND
FREEZING. MOST OTHER EQUATORIAL AREAS ARE FRIGID WITH NO PLANTS(THOUGH
THE OVERLY ENTHUSIASTIC HOPPER MAY SOMETIMES SURFACE). NIGHTIME AREAS
CAN ALSO GIVE A (ALBEIT MEDIOCRE) SKY VIEW OF THE GRID. RYAN GJK E6011
VISITED AT THE WRONG TIME OF REVOLUTION TO VIEW THOSE STARS PROPERLY...
TOO CLOUDY ANYWAY. BUT I FOUND SOME  MASSIVE  HOPPERS AT 336.79 THAT
LET ME GET RIGHT UP CLOSE TO THEM WITHOUT BOUNDING AWAY! I'VE NEVER HAD
THIS GOOD OF A LOOK AT HOPPER PSYSIOLOGY BEFORE. THOUGH I WAS NOT
SUCCESSFUL IN HITCHING A RIDE ON ONE (TWOTWOS, 6012:247.70)
